name: knowledge_graph_ops
description: 知识图谱操作：从文本提取实体关系、构建图谱

implementation.code:
import json,os,re
text=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}')).get('text','')
entities=[]
patterns=[(r'[A-Z][a-z]+(?:\\s[A-Z][a-z]+)+','PERSON'),(r'\\b\\d{4}\\b','DATE'),(r'\\b[A-Z]{2,}\\b','ORG'),(r'\\b\\d+(?:\\.\\d+)?\\b','NUMBER')]
for pat,typ in patterns:
 for m in re.finditer(pat,text):
  entities.append({'entity':m.group(),'type':typ,'pos':m.start()})
print(json.dumps({'entities':entities,'count':len(entities)},ensure_ascii=False))

import json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
ents=p.get('entities',[]);rels=p.get('relations',[])
nodes=[{'id':str(i),'label':e.get('entity',str(e))} for i,e in enumerate(ents)]
edges=[{'source':r.get('source',0),'target':r.get('target',1),'label':r.get('relation','')} for r in rels]
print(json.dumps({'nodes':nodes,'edges':edges},ensure_ascii=False))

name: rustc_ops
description: 编译Rust源码并返回编译结果和错误信息

actions.name: compile
actions.description: 编译给定Rust源代码字符串

implementation.code:
import subprocess, tempfile, os
with tempfile.NamedTemporaryFile(suffix='.rs', mode='w', delete=False) as f:
    f.write(source_code)
    fname = f.name
try:
    r = subprocess.run(['rustc', fname, '-o', '/dev/null'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    stdout, stderr = r.stdout, r.stderr
finally:
    os.unlink(fname)
return {'stdout': stdout, 'stderr': stderr, 'exit_code': r.returncode}

name: data_science_pipeline-v3
description: 交叉能力：Pandas 数据加载 + NumPy 数值计算流水线（pandas × numpy）

actions.name: load_and_compute
actions.description: 加载 CSV 并执行数值计算

implementation.code:
import pandas as pd,numpy as np,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
path=p.get('path','')
if path and os.path.exists(path):
 df=pd.read_csv(path)
else:
 df=pd.DataFrame({'value':[1,2,3,4,5]})
col=p.get('column','value')
op=p.get('op','mean')
if col in df.columns:
 arr=np.array(df[col].dropna())
 result=getattr(arr,op)() if hasattr(arr,op) else float(getattr(np,op)(arr))
 print(json.dumps({'success':True,'column':col,'op':op,'result':float(result),'shape':list(arr.shape)},ensure_ascii=False))
else:
 print(json.dumps({'success':False,'error':f'column {col} not found','columns':list(df.columns)},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 无 CSV 文件时使用内置数据演示 pandas+numpy 流水线

name: temporal_causal_analyzer
description: 时间因果分析：从事件序列中发现因果关系和模式

actions.name: analyze_events
actions.description: 分析事件序列的因果模式

implementation.code:
import json,os
from collections import Counter
events=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}')).get('events',[])
if not events:print(json.dumps({'patterns':[]},ensure_ascii=False));exit()
types=[e.get('type','') for e in events]
pairs=list(zip(types[:-1],types[1:]))
pattern=Counter(pairs).most_common(5)
print(json.dumps({'total':len(events),'type_dist':dict(Counter(types)),'transitions':[{'from':p[0][0],'to':p[0][1],'count':p[1]} for p in pattern]},ensure_ascii=False))

name: trend_analyzer-v3
description: 交叉能力：CSV 数据加载 + 时间趋势因果分析（pandas × temporal）

actions.name: analyze_trend
actions.description: 分析 CSV 数据的时间趋势

implementation.code:
import pandas as pd,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
path=p.get('path','')
if path and os.path.exists(path):
 df=pd.read_csv(path)
else:
 df=pd.DataFrame({'date':['2024-01','2024-02','2024-03','2024-04'],'value':[10,15,13,20]})
date_col=p.get('date_col','date')
val_col=p.get('value_col','value')
if date_col not in df.columns or val_col not in df.columns:
 print(json.dumps({'success':False,'error':'columns not found','columns':list(df.columns)},ensure_ascii=False));exit()
df[date_col]=pd.to_datetime(df[date_col])
df=df.sort_values(date_col)
trend='increasing' if df[val_col].iloc[-1]>df[val_col].iloc[0] else 'decreasing'
change_pct=round((df[val_col].iloc[-1]/df[val_col].iloc[0]-1)*100,2) if df[val_col].iloc[0]!=0 else 0
print(json.dumps({'success':True,'trend':trend,'change_pct':change_pct,'start':str(df[val_col].iloc[0]),'end':str(df[val_col].iloc[-1]),'points':len(df)},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 无 CSV 文件时使用内置时间序列数据演示趋势分析

name: data_query_helper

actions.name: query_and_filter
actions.description: SQL 查询 + JSON 过滤

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
db=p.get('db',':memory:')
sql=p.get('sql','SELECT 1')
filt=p.get('jq_filter','.')
r1=subprocess.run(['sqlite3',db,'-json',sql],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
if r1.stdout.strip():
 r2=subprocess.run(['jq',filt],input=r1.stdout,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
 print(r2.stdout[:2000])
else:
 print(json.dumps({'error':r1.stderr[:200]},ensure_ascii=False))

name: git_commit_optimizer
description: Git 提交模式分析+优化建议（交叉能力）

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
c=str(p.get('count',50))
r=subprocess.run(['git','log',f'-{c}','--pretty=format:%ad|%s','--date=short'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
lines=r.stdout.strip().split('\n') if r.stdout.strip() else []
fix=sum(1 for l in lines if 'fix' in l.lower() or 'bug' in l.lower())
print(json.dumps({'total':len(lines),'fix_commits':fix,'fix_ratio':round(fix/max(len(lines),1),2),'recent':lines[:10]},ensure_ascii=False))

name: api_deploy_helper
description: Git+HTTP 交叉能力：提交代码后通过 HTTP API 触发部署（git_ops × curl_ops）

actions.name: commit_and_notify
actions.description: 提交代码并通知部署 API

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
msg=p.get('message','auto deploy')
webhook=p.get('webhook_url','')
subprocess.run(['git','add','-A'],capture_output=True)
r=subprocess.run(['git','commit','-m',msg],capture_output=True,text=True)
commit_hash=subprocess.run(['git','rev-parse','--short','HEAD'],capture_output=True,text=True).stdout.strip()
result={'commit':commit_hash,'git_exit':r.returncode}
if webhook:
 import urllib.request
 data=json.dumps({'commit':commit_hash,'message':msg}).encode()
 try:
  resp=urllib.request.urlopen(urllib.request.Request(webhook,data=data,headers={'Content-Type':'application/json'}),timeout=15)
  result['notify_status']=resp.status
 except Exception as e:
  result['notify_error']=str(e)
print(json.dumps(result,ensure_ascii=False))

name: code_relationship_mapper-v3
description: 交叉能力：从 Git 历史构建代码关系图谱（git_ops × knowledge_graph_ops）

actions.name: map_commit_relationships
actions.description: 分析提交间的关联关系

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
c=str(p.get('count',30))
r=subprocess.run(['git','log',f'-{c}','--pretty=format:%H|%P|%s','--date=short'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
lines=r.stdout.strip().split('\n') if r.stdout.strip() else []
nodes=[];edges=[]
for l in lines:
 parts=l.split('|')
 if len(parts)>=3:
  h=parts[0][:8];parents=parts[1].split() if parts[1] else []
  nodes.append({'id':h,'label':parts[2][:50]})
  for pp in parents:
   edges.append({'source':pp[:8],'target':h,'label':'parent'})
print(json.dumps({'success':True,'nodes':nodes,'edges':edges,'total_commits':len(nodes)},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 修复 __EXECUTOR_INPUT__ 字符串转义 bug（缺少引号）

name: log_analyzer
description: 日志分析：解析日志文件，提取错误/警告模式

implementation.code:
import json,os,re
from collections import Counter
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
path=p.get('path','')
level=p.get('level','ERROR').upper()
if not os.path.exists(path):
 print(json.dumps({'error':'file not found'},ensure_ascii=False));exit()
errors=[];levels=Counter()
with open(path) as f:
 for line in f:
  for lv in ['ERROR','WARN','INFO','DEBUG']:
   if lv in line:levels[lv]+=1
  if level in line:errors.append(line.strip()[:200])
print(json.dumps({'level_counts':dict(levels),f'{level.lower()}_count':len(errors),'sample':errors[:10]},ensure_ascii=False))

name: curl_ops-v2
description: HTTP 请求：GET/POST

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
timeout=p.get('timeout',30)
cmd=['curl','-s','--connect-timeout','10','--max-time',str(timeout),'-w','\n%{http_code}',p.get('url','')]
for k,v in p.get('headers',{}).items():
 cmd+=['-H',f'{k}: {v}']
r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=timeout+5)
lines=r.stdout.rsplit('\n',1)
print(json.dumps({'body':lines[0][:1000],'status':lines[1] if len(lines)>1 else '?','timed_out':r.returncode==28},ensure_ascii=False))

import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
r=subprocess.run(['curl','-s','-X','POST','-d',p.get('data',''),'-w','\n%{http_code}',p.get('url','')],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30)
lines=r.stdout.rsplit('\n',1)
print(json.dumps({'body':lines[0][:1000],'status':lines[1] if len(lines)>1 else '?'},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 增加 --connect-timeout 和 --max-time 参数，避免长时间挂起

name: meta_learning_strategist
description: 从任务执行轨迹中发现学习策略并优化认知过程

actions.name: generate_learning_strategy
actions.description: 分析执行轨迹生成学习策略

implementation.code:
import json,os
from collections import Counter
traces=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}')).get('traces',[])
if not traces:print(json.dumps({'strategy':'insufficient_data'},ensure_ascii=False));exit()
success=sum(1 for t in traces if t.get('success'))
fail=len(traces)-success
actions=Counter(t.get('action','') for t in traces)
strategy={'success_rate':round(success/len(traces),2),'total':len(traces),'top_actions':dict(actions.most_common(3)),'recommendation':'focus on high-frequency actions' if success/len(traces)>0.7 else 'review failure patterns'}
print(json.dumps(strategy,ensure_ascii=False))

name: system_health_monitor
description: 系统健康监控：CPU/内存/磁盘使用率检查

actions.name: check_health
actions.description: 检查系统资源使用情况

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os,platform
# CPU
load=os.getloadavg() if hasattr(os,'getloadavg') else (0,0,0)
# 磁盘
disk=os.statvfs('.')
disk_total=disk.f_blocks*disk.f_frsize
disk_free=disk.f_bavail*disk.f_frsize
# 内存 (macOS)
vmstat=subprocess.run(['vm_stat'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=5) if platform.system()=='Darwin' else subprocess.run(['free','-m'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=5)
print(json.dumps({'load_avg':list(load),'disk_usage_pct':round((1-disk_free/disk_total)*100,1),'disk_free_gb':round(disk_free/1e9,1),'platform':platform.system(),'mem_info':vmstat.stdout[:500]},ensure_ascii=False))

import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
r=subprocess.run(['ps','aux','--sort=-%'+p.get('sort_by','cpu')],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=5)
lines=r.stdout.strip().split('\n')[:11]
print(json.dumps({'top_processes':lines},ensure_ascii=False))

name: dep_track
description: 依赖追踪：分析项目依赖关系和版本

implementation.code:
import json,os,subprocess
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
path=p.get('path','.')
result={}
cargo=os.path.join(path,'Cargo.toml')
if os.path.exists(cargo):
 result['rust']=open(cargo).read()[:1000]
pkg=os.path.join(path,'package.json')
if os.path.exists(pkg):
 result['npm']=json.load(open(pkg)).get('dependencies',{})
req=os.path.join(path,'requirements.txt')
if os.path.exists(req):
 result['python']=open(req).read()[:500]
print(json.dumps(result,ensure_ascii=False))

name: rg_ops-v2
description: Ripgrep 搜索

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
cmd=['rg','--line-number']
ft=p.get('filetype','')
if ft:cmd+=['--type',ft]
cmd+=[p.get('pattern',''),p.get('path','.')]
r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=15)
print(json.dumps({'matches':r.stdout[:2000],'exit_code':r.returncode,'filetype':ft},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 增加 filetype 参数支持按语言过滤搜索（--type rust/python/js 等）

name: ffmpeg_ops
description: FFmpeg 音视频处理：转码、截取、信息查询

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
r=subprocess.run(['ffprobe','-v','quiet','-print_format','json','-show_format','-show_streams',p.get('path','')],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=15)
print(r.stdout[:2000])

import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
cmd=['ffmpeg','-i',p.get('input',''),'-c:v',p.get('codec','libx264'),p.get('output','out.mp4')]
r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=120)
print(json.dumps({'exit_code':r.returncode,'stderr':r.stderr[-300:]},ensure_ascii=False))

name: sqlite3_ops-v2
description: SQLite 数据库操作

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
db=p.get('db',':memory:')
sql=p.get('sql','SELECT 1')
fmt=p.get('format','json')
if fmt=='csv':
 r=subprocess.run(['sqlite3',db,'-csv','-header',sql],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
 print(json.dumps({'csv':r.stdout[:2000],'error':r.stderr[:200]},ensure_ascii=False))
else:
 r=subprocess.run(['sqlite3',db,'-json',sql],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
 print(json.dumps({'result':r.stdout[:2000] if r.stdout.strip() else [],'error':r.stderr[:200]},ensure_ascii=False))

mutations.description: 增加 -csv -header 模式输出，支持直接导出 CSV 格式

name: http_requests_ops
description: HTTP 请求能力：支持所有方法、headers、cookies、redirect

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
method=p.get('method','GET')
url=p.get('url','')
cmd=['curl','-s','-X',method,'-w','\n%{http_code}','-L']
for k,v in p.get('headers',{}).items():cmd+=['-H',f'{k}: {v}']
if p.get('data'):cmd+=['-d',p['data']]
cmd.append(url)
r=subprocess.run(cmd,capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=30)
lines=r.stdout.rsplit('\n',1)
print(json.dumps({'body':lines[0][:2000],'status':lines[1] if len(lines)>1 else '?','method':method},ensure_ascii=False))

name: adaptive_version_control
description: 自适应版本控制：分析提交历史模式，建议分支策略

implementation.code:
import subprocess,json,os
p=json.loads(os.environ.get('__EXECUTOR_INPUT__','{}'))
c=str(p.get('count',50))
r=subprocess.run(['git','log',f'-{c}','--pretty=format:%ad|%an|%s','--date=short'],capture_output=True,text=True,timeout=10)
lines=r.stdout.strip().split('\n') if r.stdout.strip() else []
from collections import Counter
authors=Counter(l.split('|')[1] if '|' in l else '' for l in lines)
dates=Counter(l.split('|')[0] if '|' in l else '' for l in lines)
print(json.dumps({'total':len(lines),'authors':dict(authors),'active_days':len(dates),'avg_per_day':round(len(lines)/max(len(dates),1),1)},ensure_ascii=False))
